result.stdout:
HttpToStdout:
  A simple .NET tool for printing incoming HTTP requests to console

Usage:
  HttpToStdout [options]

Options:
  -p, --port <port>    Port to listen on [default: 8080]
  --version            Show version information
  -?, -h, --help       Show help and usage information
